s3.storagelens.selectioncriteria.Delimit.Description: This property contains the details of the S3 Storage Lens delimiter being used.

s3.storagelens.selectioncriteria.MaxDept.Description: This property contains the details of the max depth that S3 Storage Lens will collect metrics up to.

s3.storagelens.selectioncriteria.MinStor.Description: This property contains the details of the minimum storage bytes percentage threshold that S3 Storage Lens will collect metrics up to.
